caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely participating in a podcast or radio show titled "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a green cap, headphones, and a t-shirt with the text "I ON NEVER DO SHIT" printed on it. The setting appears to be a casual, personal space, possibly a home studio, as indicated by the framed photographs on the wall behind him. To the right, there is a mannequin dressed in a white shirt and gray pants, suggesting that the room might also serve as a clothing store or display area. The man seems engaged in conversation, speaking into the microphone with a focused expression. The overall atmosphere is informal and relaxed, with a mix of personal and professional elements.
